title: Wire healthcare tool into server registration and integration coverage
description: Current: server startup imports/registers 26 tools and does not expose healthcare vertical. Expected: healthcare tool is imported, registered in startup sequence, and integration assertions cover new export/registration path.
acceptance_criteria: src/index.ts imports and registers registerGenerateBrandHealthcare in the existing vertical block
Integration tests assert healthcare generator export availability from branding-core
Any tool-list consistency checks in tests/docs are updated to include healthcare
out_of_scope: Publishing to npm or MCP registry
completion_summary: Server registration and integration coverage include healthcare tool wiring and export path assertions.
